Scotland's assisted dying bill rejected after emotional debateScotland would have become the first part of the UK to legalise the process had MSPs backed the proposals. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c33j3nd1kvko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c33j3nd1kvko#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 00:04:34 GMT
Zelensky calls for Trump and Starmer to meet and find common groundIn an exclusive interview with the BBC after talks with Starmer, the Ukrainian president says the pair should meet to "re-load the relationship". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp8r813x66jo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp8r813x66jo#0 Tue, 17 Mar 2026 23:15:26 GMT
Morocco awarded Africa Cup of Nations title after Senegal win overturnedMorocco declared the winners of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations after the Confederation of African Football overturns the result of their final defeat to Senegal. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/ce949glzzglo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/ce949glzzglo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 03:24:20 GMT

'Explosive' meningitis outbreak is unprecedented, officials sayOfficials confirm 15 cases of meningitis following an outbreak in Kent, in which two people died. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cev7rl437epo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cev7rl437epo#0 Tue, 17 Mar 2026 21:54:24 GMT
